title: Sifuchi
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}}
{{CelestialBody
|image=[[File:Sifuchi-EGTW.jpg]]
|name=Sifuchi
|region=*[[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]<ref name="Location">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the [[Sifuchi system/Legends|Sifuchi system]], and therefore Sifuchi itself, in grid square M-7 as part of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Lostar sector/Legends|Lostar sector]]. Furthermore, ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places that [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]], and ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'' establishes the Lostar [[Sector/Legends|sector]] to have been a part of the [[Outer Expansion Zone/Legends|Outer Expansion Zone]], which the [[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]] further defines as a sub-region located in the northern section of the Expansion Region. Therefore, Sifuchi must also have been a part of the Outer Expansion Zone.</ref>

'''Sifuchi''' was a celestial body<ref name="Wizards">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040122threat|text=Triplet Threat|int=Triplet Threat}}</ref> located in the [[Sifuchi system/Legends|Sifuchi system]]. It was a part of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Lostar sector/Legends|Lostar sector]], being located both in the [[Outer Expansion Zone/Legends|Outer Expansion Zone]] sub-region and the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of that region.<ref name="Location" />

By some point between [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040122threat|text=Triplet Threat|int=Triplet Threat}} is set in the [[Rebellion era]] and during the existence of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], the former of which {{Blog|holocron|24|Star Wars Eras}} dates to between [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] and the latter of which was transformed into the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Noble/Legends|noble]] [[Tan Dicium]] was a [[Prince/Legends|princeling]] from Sifuchi. At one point, he and his four [[Yuzzem]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]] traveled aboard his [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] ''[[Ryntail]]'' to<ref name="Wizards" /> the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Tirahnn/Legends|Tirahnn]].<ref name="Wizards" /> Between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], Sifuchi was situated within the borders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sifuchi was introduced in "[[Triplet Threat]]," a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] mini-adventure written by [[Jason Fry]] for use with [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' and published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[January 22]], [[2004]].<ref name="Wizards" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Sifuchi [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square M-7.<ref name="TEA Sifuchi">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Sifuchi system/Legends|Sifuchi system]]</ref>
